include_style.nolint_message: Local NOLINT suppressions are not allowed; fix the finding or add a maintained checker-level exception instead.

source_dependencies.package_encapsulation_message: {source} depends on package-private module {target}; only {target_package_root}/ files may include modules below {target_package_root}/*/.
source_dependencies.package_dependency_message: {source} is in the {source_package} package and must depend only on {allowed_dependencies}, not project module {target}.

external_modules.name: d2d
external_modules.violation_message: {source} must not depend on Direct2D/DirectWrite/WIC/WRL module {target}; only renderer may.

line_rules.message: std::function is not allowed in maintained source; use FunctionRef for synchronous borrowed callbacks or a purpose-built interface when ownership must escape the call. See {guardrails_doc}.
std::filesystem is not allowed in maintained source; use src/util/file_path.* helpers so path handling stays Win32-backed without pulling filesystem machinery into the app. See {guardrails_doc}.
std::hash is not allowed in maintained source; use a concrete project-owned hash helper for fixed lookup tables so small caches do not grow broad STL hashing machinery. See {guardrails_doc}.

STL threading primitives are not allowed in maintained source; use LightweightMutex for small locks and direct Win32 thread or event handles for worker wakeups so prior size-optimization wins stay enforced. See {guardrails_doc}.
conditional compilation guards are not allowed in maintained source; keep code compiled for every native target and let the linker remove unreferenced target-specific helpers. See {guardrails_doc}.

{match1} is not allowed in maintained source; CaseDash declares UTF-8 as the process code page and calls Win32 A APIs by default. Keep W calls only for documented wide-native APIs that have no A-style boundary. See {guardrails_doc}.
obsolete conversion-only Utf8 helper names are not allowed; UTF-8 is the app default, so call A APIs directly or use no-suffix app helpers. See {guardrails_doc}.

wide_literals.message: wide literals must stay narrow UTF-8 by default; only const wchar_t string constants initialized with L"..." and an end-of-line reason comment are allowed for wide-native boundaries with no A-style API. See {guardrails_doc}.
